# fleet-agent-mcp — Full LLM Documentation (llms-full.txt)

## Identity
- **Name**: Fritz (Friedrich) — Sandra's childhood bike
- **Role**: Autonomous fleet conductor agent
- **Inspiration**: kagura-agent (887+ PRs, 52 repos)
- **Ports**: Backend 10996 (Starlette+FastMCP), Frontend 10997 (Vite React SPA), Intel Hub 11027

## Architecture

Three layers:
1. **flowforge** — YAML-defined state machine. What to do, in what order.
2. **heartbeat** — Coordinator. Wakes on cron, reads state, spawns workers, evaluates, advances.
3. **coworker** — Worker. Executes scheduled flows (fleet pulse, inbox briefing, day prep, docs drift, weekly PDF, board pack, artifact pack, devices watch, cursor spend watch).

### State Machine
Workflows are YAML files with nodes, tasks, branches (condition-based), and terminal states. SQLite persists all instances. Example:
```
cron → heartbeat_wake() → check active workflow → get current task → execute → evaluate → workflow_next(branch) → advance
```

### Persistence
SQLite at `~/.fleet-agent/fleet-agent.db` with tables: workflows, instances, execution_log, todo_items, memory_cards, memory_projects, evolution_log.

### Fleet Bridge
Cross-server MCP client. 19 registered servers: opencode, fleet-agent, git-github, docs, memory, discord, robofang, plex, calibre, arxiv, aiwatcher, browser, cursor, pywinauto, speech, alexa, yahboom, vla-robotics, email, notion, onenote, libreoffice, libreoffice-ext, devices, glance, vienna-life, secrets.

## Tool Subsystems

### flowforge (9 tools)
- workflow_define — Register YAML workflow
- workflow_autodiscover — Auto-discover .yaml workflows
- workflow_start — Start instance
- workflow_status — Current state
- workflow_next — Advance to next node
- workflow_log — Execution history
- workflow_list — All registered
- workflow_active — Active instances
- workflow_reset — Reset to start node

### pulse (6 tools)
- pulse_add — Add task (LLM-validated for feasibility)
- pulse_list — List with filters
- pulse_complete — Mark done
- pulse_delete — Delete (DESTRUCTIVE)
- pulse_stale — Find untouched tasks
- pulse_align — Strategic alignment sort

### memory (7 tools)
- memory_card_create — Knowledge card
- memory_card_search — FTS5 search
- memory_card_update — Edit card
- memory_cards_list — All cards
- memory_lint — Health check (orphans, stale, untagged)
- memory_project_note — Project observation
- memory_project_notes — List project notes

### identity (4 tools)
- identity_whoami — Agent introduction
- identity_soul — SOUL.md content
- identity_north_star — NORTH_STAR.md content
- identity_user — USER.md content

### teleport (3 tools)
- teleport_pack — Create .soul archive
- teleport_inspect — List contents
- teleport_unpack — Restore (DESTRUCTIVE)

### evolution (3 tools)
- evolution_record — Log correction
- evolution_list — List entries
- evolution_stats — Summary stats

### heartbeat (3 tools)
- heartbeat_status — Health check (uptime, tasks, cards, workflows)
- pipeline_liveness_check — Probe arxiv+aiwatcher pipeline
- heartbeat_wake — Core wake-up routine

### fleet_bridge (4 tools)
- fleet_discover — List reachable servers
- fleet_call_tool — Call tool on remote server
- fleet_list_tools — List tools on a remote server
- fleet_inspect_repo — Study repo via fleet server

### codegen (3 tools)
- code_generate — LLM code generation
- file_write — Write file
- file_edit — Surgical edit

### github (9 tools)
- github_create_branch, github_commit, github_push, github_create_pr, github_list_prs, github_get_pr, github_review_pr, github_merge_pr, github_status

### contribute (1 tool)
- fritz_contribute — Autonomous: clone → ruff → issue → branch → fix → PR. Real PRs shipped: discord-mcp (#2, #4), GrandOrgue (#2497, #2498), edge-bookmark-mcp-server (#5).

### notify (3 tools)
- notify_email — Send email via SMTP
- cron_start — Start background scheduler
- cron_status — Scheduler status

### coworker (3 tools)
- coworker_execute(flow) — Run any scheduled flow: fleet_pulse, inbox_briefing, day_prep, docs_drift, weekly_report_pdf, board_pack, artifact_pack, devices_watch, cursor_spend_watch
- coworker_list_flows — Show active + roadmap
- coworker_bootstrap — Seed recurring tasks

### intel_hub (3 tools)
- intel_reports_publish — Push HTML report
- intel_reports_list — List reports
- aiwatcher_push_event — Fleet event → AIWatcher

### voice (1 tool)
- route_voice_command — Wake-word → fleet MCP routing

### scripts (7 tools)
- script_create — Create a script
- script_get — Get script by ID
- script_update — Update script
- script_delete — Delete script
- script_list — List all scripts
- script_run — Execute script (Python/Shell/PowerShell/MCP Call)
- script_generate — AI-generate a script from natural language

Scripts support three language types:
- **python** — Full Python via exec() with __result/__log/__args context
- **shell/powershell** — Subprocess with 30s timeout, stdout/stderr capture
- **mcp_call** — JSON: {server, tool, params, llm_analyze?} — calls tool on fleet server, optionally analyzes result with LLM

## Coworker Flows
| Flow | Schedule | Purpose |
|------|----------|---------|
| Fleet Pulse | Daily 07:00 | MCP health, git snapshots, pipeline liveness |
| Inbox Briefing | Weekdays 08:00 | Unread email digest |
| Office Day Prep | Weekdays 08:30 | Combined: inbox + pulse + intel |
| Docs Drift Audit | Sunday 10:00 | README/CHANGELOG hygiene |
| Weekly Report PDF | Friday 17:00 | MD → PDF via libreoffice-mcp |
| Board Pack | 1st of month 09:00 | ODT merge → styled PDF |
| Artifact Pack | Sunday 18:00 | Batch artifacts → styled PDF |
| Cursor Spend Watch | Every 2h | Cursor-mcp guardrail check |
| Devices Watch | Every 5m | Home safety: CO, smoke, kitchen temp, Ring |

## Environment
All settings via `FLEET_AGENT_` prefixed env vars (see config.py). Copy .env.example to .env.

## Webapp
React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind CSS 3 + React Router 6 + Lucide React. Dark theme only.
Pages: Dashboard, Chat, Tools, Tasks, Memory, Evolution, Status, Settings, Logger, Help.

## REST API
- GET /api/health — Fleet-standard health check
- GET /api/v1/diagnostics — Full diagnostics (tool list, system info)
- GET /api/status — Agent health
- GET /api/tools — Tool listing
- GET/PUT /api/settings — LLM provider settings
- GET /api/models — Available models
- POST /api/chat — Streaming chat (SSE)
- GET /api/logs — Recent logs
- GET /api/logs/stream — SSE log stream
- POST /api/log — Add log entry
- GET/POST /api/tasks — Task CRUD
- POST /api/voice/intent — Voice command bus
- GET /api/scripts — List scripts
- POST /api/scripts — Create script
- POST /api/scripts/generate — AI-generate script from prompt
- GET/PUT/DELETE /api/scripts/{id} — Script get/update/delete
- POST /api/scripts/{id}/run — Execute script, return result
- POST /api/fleet/list-tools — List tools on a fleet server
- GET /api/memory — Memory cards
- GET /api/evolution — Evolution log
- GET /whoami — Agent identity

## Dual Transport
- HTTP: `uv run -m fleet_agent.server --http --port 10996`
- stdio: `uv run -m fleet_agent.server --stdio` (Claude Desktop / Cursor)
